positive: A minimalist, stylized portrait of a playful, mythical forest creature, perhaps a stylized fox or spirit animal, leaping through a grove of neon-lit mushrooms and trailing bioluminescent dust. The composition should be highly centered, emphasizing the strong, dynamic silhouette of the creature against a deep indigo and teal background. Use a graphic novel aesthetic with sharp linework and vibrant color gradients (cyberpunk nature theme). The creature should have highly defined fur/scales, casting dramatic, stylized shadows. Perfect for screen printing on fabric, clean outlines, flat planes of color, no photorealism. High contrast, dramatic rim lighting, centered composition, vector illustration style.
negative: photorealistic, ugly, deformed, artifacts, low resolution, blurry, text, signature, watermark, logo, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grayscale, noisy, dirty, low detail
